# init(url:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a placeholder link view without metadata for a given URL.

## Declaration

```swift
init(url URL: URL)
```

## Creating a link view

- **init(metadata:)**: Initializes a link view with specified metadata.

items.description: Initializes a link view with specified metadata.
items.name: init(metadata:)
